name: PER_PORTRAIT_MESSAGES_B
description: This table stores administrator messages that should appear on the  Portrait Pages.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: SHOW_CAL_EVT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Calendar Event Category which should be included in portrait messages.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the portrait message like STATUS , BROADCAST etc.

columns.Name: TIME_FROM
columns.Comments: Date and Time on Server that message will start being shown

columns.Name: TIME_TO
columns.Comments: Date and Time on server that message will stop being shown

columns.Name: TARGET_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Optionally specify a Person, such that the message appears when the user views the portrait of a person.

columns.Name: TARGET_DEPARTMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Optionally specify a Department, such that the message appears when the user views the portrait of a person who is a member of that Department.

columns.Name: TARGET_LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Optionally specify a Location, such that the message appears when the user views the portrait of a person who is a member of that Location.

columns.Name: TARGET_ORGANIZATION_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: Optionally specify an Organization Hierarchy , such that the message appears when the user views the portrait of a person who is a member of that Organization Hierarchy.

columns.Name: TARGET_ORGANIZATION_TOP_NODE
columns.Comments: Optionally specify the Organization in the Organization hierarchy that is to be considered the top for the message. Portraits of people in organizations above this do not show this message.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
